hero_sub_line_1: Ximia AI replaces forms, chatbots, and websites that don't convert.

messages.text: Hi, I'm looking to invest my savings.
Perfect. Are you looking for immediate monthly rental income or long-term appreciation (pre-construction)?
USD rent, as soon as possible.
Got it. I'll filter for finished projects in high-demand areas (e.g. AIRBNB). Shall we proceed with that profile?
I love unit 4B, but I only have $120k in cash.
The price is $150k. With your $120k (80%), you instantly qualify for our 24-month developer financing. The installment would be $1,250/mo.
Validated ✔️. Preparing the formal simulation and connecting you with the sales team to reserve.
Family of 4. We want a house with a backyard.
Logged: Family use, 4 people, outdoor space. North zone or Pilar corridor?
I have 3 properties that are an exact match (all 3 beds + garden). Would you like to schedule visits for the highest-ranked one?

problem_intro_line1: Generating leads isn't the problem anymore.
problem_intro_line2: It's knowing what to do with them at the exact right moment.
problem_headline: And they already closed with someone else.
problem_stat_caption: of your leads are just noise
problem_items: Your team wastes hours on manual qualification
Hot leads go cold waiting for a response
The process is bottlenecked by human limits

process_steps.label: 01 · Capture
process_steps.title: Turns natural language into actionable data
process_steps.description: While the user is having a conversation, Ximia interprets intent, context, and needs, transforming every message into structured data without relying on forms.

process_steps.label: 02 · Analyze
process_steps.title: Validates feasibility with deterministic logic
process_steps.description: Extracted data is processed against real financial rules, evaluating purchasing capacity with zero assumptions or guesswork.

process_steps.label: 03 · Decide
process_steps.title: Activates data-driven decisions
process_steps.description: Combines profile, intent, and budget with available inventory to surface only the options that truly fit.

process_steps.label: 04 · Close
process_steps.title: Delivers a sales-ready lead
process_steps.description: The output isn’t a conversation — it’s a complete, validated, and prioritized profile ready for your sales team to act with precision.

backend_title: Technology that understands, validates, and decides in real time.
backend_subtitle: Ximia combines language models, structured extraction, and deterministic logic to transform conversations into data, validate them, and operate with absolute precision.

backend_items.title: NLP → JSON Extraction Engine
backend_items.description: While the user converses in natural language, the system interprets the input via language models and extracts critical variables like available capital, household composition, and buying horizon. These variables are not stored as text: they are structured into system-usable data, eliminating the need for forms.

backend_items.title: Deterministic Financial Validation
backend_items.description: Language models are not involved in calculations. Extracted variables are processed in a separate layer, where they are evaluated against financial rules, market conditions, and business logic. The result is consistent, reproducible, and strictly aligned with real-world data.

backend_items.title: Insight Scoring + Signal Analysis
backend_items.description: Every interaction generates signals that the system interprets beyond explicit content: intent, urgency, consistency, and behavior. These signals consolidate into a dynamic scoring model that reflects the true maturity of the lead, evolving continuously as the conversation progresses.

cta_headline: Don’t scale your team. Scale your closing capacity.
cta_subheadline: Ximia generates and qualifies leads 24/7, prioritizes real opportunities, and frees your team to focus on closing deals instead of filtering contacts.
